summary.purpose: Stop broad tree implementation to resolve multi-action talent/feat surfacing in the combat actions UI.
summary.patchScope: Generic resolver + sheet UI bridge + curated starter data. No tree-per-JS files and no broad runtime automation.

architecture.sourceOfTruth: Owned feat/talent item metadata: system.abilityMeta.combatActions, plus existing actionEconomyRules where safely convertible into manual action cards.
architecture.sheetPath: scripts/sheets/v2/character-sheet.js builds combatActions groups and registers ability-owned action cards into the existing economy lanes.
architecture.manualResolutionPolicy: Cards that require multi-attack sequencing, target adjudication, per-encounter tracking, or temporary effects are displayed and consume the correct action economy, then post a chat card. They do not pretend to resolve passive bonuses automatically.
architecture.futureAutomationPath: When a child action gets a real executor, change that card from manualResolution to an explicit resolutionMode and route through CombatEngine/CombatOptionResolver/action-economy systems.

gunslingerDataRepair.issue: Pistol Duelist text for End Game, Snap Aiming, and Stand Ready had been merged into Multiattack Proficiency (pistols).
fixes: Created Pistol Duelist as its own Gunslinger talent document.
Added End Game, Snap Aiming, and Stand Ready as three Standard-action child combat cards.
Cleaned Multiattack Proficiency (pistols) back to the multiple-attack penalty-reduction concept and removed child action text from that talent.
Added Pistol Duelist to the Gunslinger talent tree.
